query:
SELECT professor_name, university, url, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM project_matches 
WHERE url IS NOT NULL AND url != ''
GROUP BY professor_name, university, url
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT professor_name, university, url, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM project_matches 
WHERE url IS NOT NULL AND url != ''
GROUP BY professor_name, university, url
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
